prompt: Generate a simple 3D render scene inspired by the reference. Depict basic geometric objects like cubes and spheres arranged on a plane. Apply flat shading and primary colors, showcasing fundamental computer graphics rendering principles.
prompt_refined: Generate a simple 3D render scene inspired by image 1. The scene depicts basic geometric objects arranged on a flat, reflective grey plane. A blue sphere is positioned on the left, with its reflection visible on the plane. A red rectangular prism stands in the foreground, centrally placed and partially obscuring the blue sphere. To the right of the red prism and slightly behind it, a green L-shaped object, composed of two rectangular prisms, is present. All objects exhibit flat shading with clear primary colors (red, blue, green) and cast subtle shadows, set against a pure black background.
objects: blue sphere positioned on the left
red rectangular prism in the foreground, centrally placed, partially obscuring the blue sphere
green L-shaped object composed of two rectangular prisms, to the right of the red prism and slightly behind it
objects in primary colors (red, blue, green)
